studios.name: Bones
studios.detail: Bones is known for high-energy action, sharp character animation, and series that balance style with emotional clarity.

studios.name: MAPPA
studios.detail: MAPPA has become one of the most visible modern studios, especially for darker action series and high-profile adaptations.

studios.name: Kyoto Animation
studios.detail: Kyoto Animation is celebrated for polished visuals, expressive acting, and detailed slice-of-life storytelling.

studios.name: Toei Animation
studios.detail: Toei Animation is one of the most influential studios in anime history and has helped define long-running shonen and classic franchises.

studios.name: ufotable
studios.detail: ufotable is recognized for striking compositing, fluid action, and detailed visual effects.

studios.name: Madhouse
studios.detail: Madhouse has produced a wide range of acclaimed titles, from psychological thrillers to modern action staples.

studios.name: Production I.G
studios.detail: Production I.G is known for polished sci-fi, cyberpunk, and action-oriented storytelling.

studios.name: Sunrise
studios.detail: Sunrise is famous for mecha, space opera, and high-impact adventure series.

studios.name: Pierrot
studios.detail: Pierrot is strongly associated with long-running shonen titles and supernatural action series.

studios.name: White Fox
studios.detail: White Fox has built a strong reputation for time-loop, fantasy, and thriller anime.
related: Re:Zero - Starting Life in Another World

studios.name: CloverWorks
studios.detail: CloverWorks is known for clean design, expressive character work, and popular contemporary titles.

studios.name: David Production
studios.detail: David Production is best known for stylized action direction and unmistakable visual identity.

studios.name: Science Saru
studios.detail: Science Saru is recognized for bold visual experimentation and modern supernatural storytelling.

studios.name: OLM
studios.detail: OLM has produced family-friendly adventure series and more recent mystery and historical titles.

studios.name: Gainax
studios.detail: Gainax helped shape modern mecha and experimental anime storytelling.

studios.name: A-1 Pictures
studios.detail: A-1 Pictures has handled a wide mix of contemporary action, fantasy, and drama titles.

studios.name: Mushi Production
studios.detail: Mushi Production is tied to foundational works in sports and drama anime history.

studios.name: TMS Entertainment
studios.detail: TMS Entertainment has a long history across action, mystery, and long-running franchises.

studios.name: Brain's Base
studios.detail: Brain's Base has produced memorable mystery and character-focused series.

studios.name: Bind
studios.detail: Bind is closely associated with Mushoku Tensei.

studios.name: Manglobe
studios.detail: Manglobe is known for distinct visual style and atmospheric sci-fi storytelling.

studios.name: Gonzo
studios.detail: Gonzo is known for a wide range of adventure, thriller, and early 2000s cult-favorite anime.

studios.name: Shaft
studios.detail: Shaft is recognized for stylized direction and experimental visual language.

studios.name: Trigger
studios.detail: Trigger is known for kinetic animation and bold sci-fi action.
studios.imageSourcePath: wikimedia-commons:File:Logo of the Trigger anime studio.svg

creators.name: Eiichiro Oda
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Professional mangaka affiliated with Shueisha.
creators.detail: Creator of One Piece, one of the best-selling manga series of all time.

creators.name: Hideaki Anno
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Founded Gainax and later led Khara projects.
creators.detail: Known for Neon Genesis Evangelion and its existential, psychological storytelling.

creators.name: Yoshihiro Togashi
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Published through Shueisha's Weekly Shonen Jump.
creators.detail: Creator of Yu Yu Hakusho and Hunter x Hunter.

creators.name: Kohei Horikoshi
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Published through Shueisha's Weekly Shonen Jump.

creators.name: Kunihiko Ikuhara
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Directed for Toei Animation and later independent projects.
creators.detail: Known for Sailor Moon and highly symbolic storytelling.

creators.name: Haruo Sotozaki
creators.detail: Director of Demon Slayer's modern anime adaptation and film work.

creators.name: Naoko Takeuchi
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Published through Kodansha and later Shueisha-related media.

creators.name: Satoshi Kon
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Worked with Madhouse on key projects.
creators.detail: Known for psychological works that blur reality and performance.

creators.name: Atsushi Ohkubo
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Published through Square Enix and later adapted widely.
creators.detail: Creator of Soul Eater and Fire Force.

creators.name: Shinichiro Watanabe
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Worked with Sunrise and other major studios.

creators.name: Rei Hiroe
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Published through Square Enix.

creators.name: Naoki Urasawa
creators.detail: Creator of Monster and a major name in psychological suspense manga.

creators.name: Rumiko Takahashi
creators.detail: One of the most influential manga creators in modern anime history.

creators.name: Yusuke Murata
creators.detail: Artist of One Punch Man's manga adaptation.
